name: Gas Station
author: Poki
description: Gas Station is a fun management game where you build the gas station of your dreams and rise as a true garage tycoon. Clear debris, rebuild and expand your station, and service all kinds of cars to keep customers happy. Unlock exciting upgrades, manage your business wisely, and take part in limited-time events like servicing high-speed racing cars. Can you turn a rundown stop into a bustling fuel empire? How do I play Gas Station? Use your mouse, the WASD or the Arrow keys to move and play! Who created Gas Station? Gas Station is created by StoreRider. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Gas Station for free? You can play Gas Station for free on Poki. Can I play Gas Station on mobile devices and desktop? Gas Station can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
